category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Gas Town as a multi-agent orchestration system and workspace manager for AI coding agents.
source_facts.description says it is a multi-agent workspace manager.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is "Gas Town".
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface and the source_facts.homepage redirects to that repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README names Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex, Gemini, persistent work tracking, and git-backed hooks.
